feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Problems with the service layer in the Order POST
entry.content:
I use this endpoint
POST: http://xxxxxx:50003/b1s/v1/Orders
with this JSON

 

{

    "CardCode": "10260237-4C",

    "DocDate": "2025-03-19",

    "SalesPersonCode": -1,

    "Rounding": "tNO",

    "DocumentSubType": "bod_None",

    "Series": 13,

    "Comments": “Test",

    "DocumentLines": [

        {

            "ItemCode": "A00001",

            "PriceAfterVAT": 1785.0,

            "Quantity": 1.0,

            "TaxCode": "IVA",

            "WarehouseCode": "01"

        }

    ]

}

The response is :

{
    "error": {
        "code": -1,
        "message": {
            "lang": "en-us",
            "value": "BadFormat"
        }
    }
}
I changed the json to something simpler, but the error is the same.
{
    "CardCode": "10260237-4C",
    "DocDate": "2025-03-19",
    "DocumentLines": [
        {
            "ItemCode": "A00001",
            "Quantity": 1.0
        }
    ]
}
The product and business partner exist and are active
What's the problem? What am I missing?

entry.title: Inventory Posting of stock count items row limits
entry.content:
Hi All

I would like to ask if there is an increase in row limits for Inventory Posting of stock count items in SAP version 10 as the previous version 9 limits the rows to 999?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: PO Unit Price Exceeds Budget – Approval Query Issue
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I want to trigger an approval process if the unit price in the purchase order document exceeds the budget allocated to the corresponding G/L account. I have written an approval query for this, but it is not working as expected. The issue is that it also triggers approval for unit prices that are within the budget limits.

Could you help me rewrite the approval query correctly? Here is the query I have written:

SELECT DISTINCT 'TRUE' FROM OPOR T0
INNER JOIN POR1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry"
INNER JOIN OBGT T2 ON T2."AcctCode" = T1."AcctCode"
INNER JOIN BGT1 T3 ON T2."AbsId" = T3."BudgId"

WHERE $[$38.14.NUMBER] > T2."DebLTotal"
AND T2."DebLTotal" > 0
AND T2."FinancYear" = '2025-01-01'

Thanks. Regards.

entry.title: Approval Query for A/P Invoice Changes from Approved PO
entry.content:
Hi experts,

What approval query should be written to trigger approval for an A/P Invoice, if any data from the approved Purchase Order document, from which the A/P Invoice was created, is modified?

Thanks. Regards.

entry.title: The capability of SAP B1 to handle 10,000 invoices per day.
entry.content: Hi Experts.  There are rumors among SAP B1 competitors that SAP B1 can handle only about 2500 invoices per day.  My question is “From a technical standpoint, can SAP B1 handle loading up to 10,000 invoices per day, where each invoice contains an average of 10 inventory items (i.e., around 100,000 records per day), given that the database is SQL Server and invoices are loaded via API in daily time intervals?”

entry.title: Regarding the Depreciation Area Inquiry
entry.content:
When intangible assets are depreciated using the direct method, how should the depreciation area for the asset class be set?

The default depreciation area is for the indirect method, and I added a depreciation area for the direct method, which was then assigned to asset classes requiring the direct method.

For the indirect method, I set the depreciation type as "No Depreciation," and for the direct method, I set the depreciation type as "Straight-Line Method."

Is this the general setup? Please confirm.

below attachment is "Asset Class" form

Thank you.

entry.title: Closing a large number of A/R invoices by a deposit transaction
entry.content: A customer has been using SAP B1 HANA version for their logistics, not for financial management for the last 4 year, now they would like to use it for financial management as well as logistics.  They would like to close a large number of AR invoices which has been accumulated for the last 4 year, as a B2C online business company.  I tried to open the deposit transaction with a specific BP no, but the message shows that the no of open AR is over 80000, so this can lead to SAP B1 error.  I did not go ahead.   Is there any other method to close a large no of AR more than 100,000 efficiently ?

entry.title: SAP Business One 10.0 FP2305 DIServer always gives "wrong user id and password" in login response.
entry.content: SAP Business One 10.0 FP2305 DIServer always gives "wrong user id and password" in login response even if user has correct credentials and I have assigned a professional license to B1i user. Any help will be appreciated.

entry.title: IMMOBILIZATION WITH VAT IN SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello,

If I purchase a fixed asset on SAP and apply a 20% VAT,
the acquisition value of my fixed asset is the amount excluding tax (HT), not the amount including tax (amount after VAT), so the planned depreciation is excluding tax, but that's not what I need; I want to depreciate the amount including tax;
For that, I performed an asset revaluation on SAP and defined the amount including tax, but always the same planned depreciation.

Any idea?

Exemple: 

Fixed Asset IM005517
Excluding VAT: 22,000.00
Including VAT: 26,000.00
Planned Depreciation: 122.00
Desired Depreciation: 144.00

Regards.

entry.title: Problemas al actualizar orden usando B1S-ReplaceCollectionsOnPatch
entry.content:
Estimados buen día para todos, tengo el caso siguiente:
Estoy actualizando una Orden uso el metodo Patch, tambien uso B1S-ReplaceCollectionsOnPatch = true
el caso que cada vez que actualizo un documento, el campo "UnitPrice" no se actualiza en algunas líneas de detalle.

Lo único que he identificado es que si este valor coincide anteriormente simplemente lo deja en valor 0.

Recien cuando realizo un segundo envío este actualiza los valores correctos:

ya he probado agregandole el campo  "LineNum" pero en estos casos me sale el error

"value": "Esta entrada ya existe en las tablas siguientes (ODBC -2035)"

Les adjunto el json que genera la Orden (Generar_OC.txt) y el que modifica (Modificar_OC.txt)

espero me puedan brindar su apoyo.

Atte. Jose Vasquez

entry.title: InventoryGenEntries with InternalSerialNumber
entry.content:
Good afternoon to all.

I would like to see if someone can help me. I can successfully enter products from my API using the endpoint 

https://XXXXXX:50000/b1s/v1/InventoryGenEntries with the body  

{
  "DocumentLines": [
    {
      "ItemCode": "410224",
      "Quantity": 1,
      "WarehouseCode": "001",
      "AccountCode": "1.01.004.01.002",
    }
  ]
} But now i need to send the lot number. I'm trying to do the following. 
{
"DocumentLines": [
{
"ItemCode": "410224",
"Quantity": 1,
"WarehouseCode": "001",
"AccountCode": "1.01.004.01.002",
"SerialNumbers": [
{
"InternalSerialNumber": "1424"
}
]
}
]
} but it give me this error  {
"error": {
"code": -10,
"message": {
"lang": "en-us",
"value": "10001172 - Blank strings are not allowed in row 1 (in unique field). [OSRN.SysNumber][line: 0]"
}
}
}. Can some one help me. Thank you!!!!

entry.title: SAP B1 Web Client Extension Not Showing
entry.content:
I am creating an extension to test extensibility in the SAP B1 Web Client, but it is not appearing.

To make sure the issue isn't related to the extension I created, I followed these steps:

  1. I downloaded the sample file from the documentation to add it directly in the Extension Manager.
    SAP Documentation - Adding Extensions

  2. I extracted the ZIP file and imported it into the Extension Manager.



  3. I assigned it to the company.

  4. I opened the Web Client, but the extension does not appear in the corresponding section.

    I also checked the side menu, and it is not listed there either.

     

Am I missing any steps or configurations to make the extension visible?🤔

SAP Business One SAP Business One Extensibility

entry.title: I faced an issue when I tried to install SAP Business One 10.0 (version 2502) with an SQL database.
entry.content: I faced an issue when I tried to install SAP Business One 10.00.280 (version 2502) with an SQL database. Getting a Error "Failed to connect to server; enter a valid server name, user ID, and password. Verify that you have the SBOCOMMON database and try again. "

entry.title: OUTB Table not found when printing Open Item Lists in Sales
entry.content: Hello everyone, I have SAP Business One Hana, and when opening the list of open items in the sales module, I get the error "OUTB Table not found...". I have read some posts, and they recommend checking SAP Note 3287549. Has anyone managed to solve this problem without upgrading the version?

entry.title: error message: enter a valid currency when running Receivable aging report
entry.content:
Hi, we have a SAP BUSINESS ONE user that when he tries to run "Receivable aging report" he gets the error message: "Enter valid currency". This happens only with this user, all other users can run the report perfectly.

We have already checked this:

  • The report gives the error with any date.

  • The report gives the error only with one user; if I log in with a manager or any other user, it works.

  • The user has a professional license.

  • All associated accounts are marked as "All currencies," however, only transactions are done in EUR euro.

  • All business partners are marked as "All currencies," however, only transactions are done in EUR euro.

  • All marketing documents are assigned "Local Currency."

  • The system reports were reset.

Thank you in advance.

Regards,

Guillermo Caviglia

entry.title: Tax Report Error SAP B1
entry.content: Hello, I processed a manual journal entry that does not require tax. The processed journal entry appears in the tax report. What could be the reason?

entry.title: Unexpected Journal Entry Appearing in Tax Report with Incorrect Taxable Amounts
entry.content:
We encountered an issue in SAP Business One where a journal entry (JE) related to an internal fund transfer (reclassification entry) appears in the tax report, even though it contains no tax-related transactions. Additionally, the taxable amount and tax values in the report do not match the original JE details.

For example, the JE records a 29,900 TRY transfer between accounts, but the tax report incorrectly displays 1,250 TRY taxable amount and 250 TRY tax, which disrupts the tax declaration.

entry.title: Controlling Reports: Aging Reports - Calculation errors in SAP B1 TB_1100 training manual
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I was preparing a training session on the Controlling Reports: Aging Reports using the training Manual when I come across to calculation errors of the Balance Due, Aging Intervals and the Percentages on the training Manual TB-1100 (page 225 or 235 on slide).

I request the update of this to ensure consistency and correctness of the training data.

Below the screen with the errors and attached is the correct information.

"...In the image you can see both A/R invoices for Funtech the customer and A/P invoices for Funtech the
vendor. The total balance due took into consideration the A/P invoices amount."

Best Regards

Santos Joao

entry.title: list of default reports for user
entry.content:
Hello,

Where can I find the information about user defaults PLD reports?

I have SAP HANA 10 FP2108 version

 

Thank you in advance,

Marina Levy

entry.title: Numeración en certificado de retención
entry.content:
Buenos dias estimados expertos,

tengo una duda con respecto a los certificados de retencion (Carta Certificada) que emite SAP B1 cuando se efectura el pago de una factura de proveedor que aplica retencion, en nuestro pais este certificado debe llevar un numero, similar a una factura que lleva un numero unico, revisando en el area donde se crean las series de numeracion de todos los documentos veo que no esta el apartado para los certificados de retencion, de que otra manera se le puede asignar una numeracion a esos certificados?

 

De antemano agradezco su apoyo,

 

Saludos Cordiales
